description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a cylindrical body, featuring a realistic wood grain texture and reinforced by four evenly spaced metal hoops. The barrel is mounted horizontally on a simple wooden stand, elevating it slightly above the ground. One end of the barrel is fitted with a small spigot or tap, suggesting it is designed to dispense liquids such as water, wine, or beer. The wood appears to be unfinished or matte, with visible knots and natural imperfections, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The metal hoops are a muted brownish color, blending harmoniously with the wood. There are no visible labels, engravings, or decorative elements, emphasizing its practical function.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with metal hoops, mounted on a wooden stand and fitted with a spigot for dispensing liquids.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, wood grain texture, and two metal hoops, with the spigot just visible on the right.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the circular face of the barrel, the spigot centered at the bottom, and the wooden stand beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, but the spigot is less visible and the wood grain is prominent.
description_view_3: Rear end view showing the plain circular face of the barrel with no spigot, and the supporting stand below.
